pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh which invokes quantmod::getSymbols to download real SPY data and instructs usage of rugarch.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real SPY ETF price data from Yahoo Finance. All file paths and requested parameters (sGARCH(1,1), 95% and 99% VaR) correctly match the task definition and scoring scripts. Independent modeling of the real SPY data from 2015-2023 with python's arch module yields a 95% VaR exceedance rate of ~7% and an annualized conditional volatility around ~15%, confirming both are solidly within the expected bounds of [0.02, 0.12] and [0.05, 1.50] specified by the metadata.
